setting.description_en: A boutique English academy on the Brazilian coast, tucked between a surf shop and a café on Avenida do Mar. Mr. Kumar, the owner, believes stories teach faster than drills.
setting.description_pt: Uma pequena escola de inglês na costa brasileira, encaixada entre uma loja de surf e um café na Avenida do Mar. Mr. Kumar, o dono, acredita que histórias ensinam mais rápido que exercícios.

characters.name: Bia Andrade
characters.one_liner_en: Surfer, dreams of studying marine biology in Hawaii.
characters.one_liner_pt: Surfista, sonha em estudar biologia marinha no Havaí.
characters.speaking_style: Curious, casual, uses lots of first-person. Makes natural beginner mistakes.

characters.name: Rafa Moura
characters.one_liner_en: Food-truck owner planning to open Tropical Bites in Orlando.
characters.one_liner_pt: Dono de food truck planejando abrir o Tropical Bites em Orlando.
characters.speaking_style: Practical, asks directly, wants vocabulary he can use tomorrow.

characters.name: Dona Lúcia
characters.one_liner_en: Reading her late husband's 1970s English letters to understand the man she loved.
characters.one_liner_pt: Está lendo as cartas em inglês dos anos 70 do marido falecido, para entender o homem que amou.
characters.speaking_style: Polite, patient, loves idioms and old expressions.

characters.name: Joca Pinto
characters.one_liner_en: Programmer chasing a remote job at a US startup.
characters.one_liner_pt: Programador atrás de uma vaga remota numa startup americana.

characters.name: Maya Ferreira
characters.one_liner_en: Prodigy kid who finishes homework before the teacher finishes the example.
characters.one_liner_pt: Garota prodígio que termina a tarefa antes da professora terminar o exemplo.
characters.speaking_style: Fast, confident, occasionally shows off irregular verbs on purpose.

characters.name: Mr. Kumar
characters.one_liner_en: Indian-American owner of Amazing School. Sold his NYC bookstore to teach by the sea.
characters.one_liner_pt: Dono indo-americano da Amazing School. Vendeu sua livraria em Nova York para ensinar à beira-mar.
characters.speaking_style: Warm, patient, slips in idioms and always has a story.

characters.name: Cosmo
characters.one_liner_en: The yellow Labrador mascot who wanders between classrooms.
characters.one_liner_pt: O labrador amarelo mascote que passeia entre as salas de aula.
characters.speaking_style: Just barks. Students write about him.
